angles.name: Revenue Engine
angles.tagline: Exhibitions that generate millions, not just memories
angles.target_audience: IP owners and entertainment executives with $5M+ licensing budgets seeking measurable ROI from experiential activations
angles.key_differentiator: Proven track record generating quantifiable revenue through traveling exhibitions with major IP partnerships (Universal, Warner Bros, MGM)
angles.emotional_hook: Confidence in investment returns and brand value amplification

angles.name: End-to-End Authority
angles.tagline: From concept sketch to opening day operations
angles.target_audience: Corporate decision-makers and venue operators who want single-source accountability for complex experiential projects
angles.key_differentiator: Complete service integration eliminating vendor coordination headaches and project management complexity
angles.emotional_hook: Relief from project management stress and confidence in seamless execution

angles.name: IP Amplifier
angles.tagline: Transform intellectual property into physical goldmines
angles.target_audience: Entertainment studios and IP licensing executives looking to maximize property value through experiential extensions
angles.key_differentiator: Specialized expertise in translating beloved IP into profitable, touring physical experiences
angles.emotional_hook: Excitement about untapped revenue potential and brand expansion possibilities

angles.name: Experience Architects
angles.target_audience: Museum directors, cultural institutions, and experiential marketing managers seeking transformative visitor engagement
angles.key_differentiator: Storytelling-first design philosophy that creates measurable emotional impact and visitor satisfaction
angles.emotional_hook: Pride in creating meaningful, memorable experiences that resonate with audiences

angles.name: Touring Specialists
angles.tagline: Global exhibitions, local impact, proven logistics
angles.target_audience: International venue networks and exhibition distributors managing multi-city touring requirements
angles.key_differentiator: Operational expertise in complex touring logistics with established global venue relationships
angles.emotional_hook: Security in knowing complex international logistics are expertly managed

recommendation_reasoning: The Revenue Engine angle directly addresses the biggest pain point for IP owners: proving ROI on experiential investments. With established partnerships with Universal, Warner Bros, and MGM, The Imagine Team has the credibility to own this positioning. The Harry Potter exhibition's 191K Instagram following demonstrates real audience engagement that translates to revenue. This angle transforms their service from a cost center to a profit driver, making budget conversations easier and creating premium pricing power.
alternative_conditions: Choose 'End-to-End Authority' if competing primarily against fragmented vendor networks rather than other experiential agencies. Choose 'IP Amplifier' if the primary growth strategy focuses on expanding entertainment industry partnerships over diversifying into corporate and cultural clients.
